name: The Conjuring
description: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their farmhouse.

name: The Nun
description: A priest and a novice investigate the mysterious suicide of a nun in Romania and confront a demonic force.

name: Annabelle
description: A couple experiences terrifying supernatural events involving a vintage doll after their home is invaded by cultists.

name: Insidious
description: A family seeks help when their son becomes the vessel for spirits from a mysterious astral realm.

name: It
description: A group of kids face a shape-shifting monster that terrorizes the town of Derry every 27 years.

name: The Ring
description: A journalist investigates a cursed videotape that kills anyone who watches it within seven days.

name: Veronica
description: A teenage girl accidentally unleashes a supernatural force after attempting a séance with friends.

name: Ouija
description: Friends awaken dark supernatural powers while using an ancient spirit board.

name: Sinister
description: A true-crime writer discovers disturbing home movies that unleash a supernatural entity.

name: Shutter
description: A photographer finds ghostly figures appearing in photographs after a tragic accident.

name: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo
description: A journalist and a hacker investigate a wealthy family’s dark secrets and a decades-old disappearance.

name: Knives Out
description: A detective investigates the mysterious death of a wealthy crime novelist and his eccentric family.

name: Vivarium
description: A couple becomes trapped in a surreal suburban neighborhood with no escape.

name: Drive Back
description: A couple driving home late at night encounters strange events and an unknown pursuer on a lonely road.

name: Escape Room
description: Six strangers must solve deadly puzzles in mysterious escape rooms to survive.

name: Brick
description: A teenage loner investigates the disappearance of his ex-girlfriend and uncovers a criminal underground.

name: The Platform
description: Prisoners in a vertical facility watch food descend floor by floor, revealing brutal inequality.

name: The Girl on the Train
description: An alcoholic divorcee becomes entangled in a missing person investigation.

name: Oldboy
description: After being imprisoned for 15 years, a man seeks revenge and the truth behind his captivity.

name: The Housemaid
description: A young housemaid becomes involved in a wealthy family's dangerous web of secrets and obsession.

name: The Dictator
description: The story of a ruthless dictator who risks his life to ensure that democracy never comes to the country he rules.

name: American Pie
description: Four teenage boys make a pact to lose their virginity before they graduate from high school.

name: Blockers
description: Three parents attempt to stop their daughters from making a pact to lose their virginity on prom night.

name: Junior
description: A scientist volunteers to carry a pregnancy himself after a drug experiment goes wrong.

name: Zombieland
description: A shy student teams up with three strangers to survive a zombie apocalypse across America.

name: Home Alone
description: An eight-year-old boy accidentally left behind must defend his home from two burglars during Christmas.

name: The Hangover
description: Three friends wake up from a bachelor party in Las Vegas with no memory of the night and must find the missing groom.

name: Ted
description: A man whose childhood teddy bear magically came to life must deal with its crude and irresponsible behavior as an adult.

name: Sex Tape
description: A married couple accidentally shares their private video online and races to recover it before anyone sees it.

name: Kung Fu Hustle
description: In Shanghai, a small-time crook pretends to be a member of a feared gang but ends up in a battle with legendary kung fu masters.

name: Casino Royale
description: James Bond earns his 00 status and must defeat a terrorist financier in a high-stakes poker game.

name: Ballerina
description: A deadly assassin trained by the Ruska Roma seeks revenge for the murder of her family.

name: Ghosted
description: A romantic date turns into an international spy adventure when a man discovers his girlfriend is a secret agent.

name: Heart of Stone
description: An intelligence operative races to stop a powerful AI weapon from falling into the wrong hands.

name: Red Notice
description: An FBI profiler reluctantly teams up with an art thief to catch the world's most wanted criminal.

name: John Wick
description: A retired hitman returns to the criminal underworld to hunt down the gangsters who took everything from him.

name: Spy
description: A desk-bound CIA analyst volunteers to go undercover to stop a global terrorist threat.

name: The Avengers
description: Earth's mightiest heroes must unite to stop Loki and his alien army from conquering the planet.

name: Fast & Furious
description: An undercover cop infiltrates the world of illegal street racing while investigating hijackings.

name: xXx: Return of Xander Cage
description: Extreme athlete Xander Cage returns from exile to recover a powerful weapon known as Pandora’s Box.

name: Passengers
description: Two passengers aboard a spacecraft traveling to a distant colony planet wake up 90 years early from hibernation and must face isolation and danger together.

name: Interstellar
description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

name: Life
description: A team of astronauts aboard the International Space Station discover a rapidly evolving life form that threatens all life on Earth.

name: Gravity
description: Two astronauts work together to survive after an accident leaves them stranded in space.
A scientist discovers that a global cataclysm is about to destroy Earth and races to warn the world.

name: Underwater
description: Researchers at an underwater drilling facility struggle to reach safety after an earthquake devastates their base.

name: Avatar
description: A paraplegic marine is sent to the moon Pandora and becomes torn between following orders and protecting the alien world.

name: Arrival
description: A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien lifeforms after mysterious spacecraft land around the world.

name: The Astronaut
description: A space explorer returning from a mission begins experiencing strange visions that may not be from Earth.

name: Ex Machina
description: A programmer is invited to test the intelligence of a humanoid robot with advanced artificial intelligence.

name: Resident Evil
description: A security team must battle hordes of undead after a deadly virus is accidentally released in an underground laboratory.

name: Train To Busan
description: Passengers on a high-speed train fight for survival when a zombie outbreak spreads across South Korea.

name: World War Z
description: A former United Nations investigator travels the world to find a way to stop a global zombie pandemic.

name: #Alive
description: A gamer trapped in his apartment must survive alone during a zombie outbreak in Seoul.

name: Nowhere
description: A pregnant woman stranded in a shipping container fights to survive at sea after escaping a totalitarian country.

name: Fall
description: Two friends climb a 2,000-foot radio tower and become stranded at the top with no way down.

name: The Shallows
description: A surfer becomes stranded on a rock 200 yards from shore while a great white shark stalks her.

name: 47 Meters Down
description: Two sisters become trapped in a shark cage at the bottom of the ocean with limited oxygen.

name: No Way Up
description: Passengers struggle to survive after a plane crashes into the ocean and sinks near an underwater ravine.

name: The Last Breath
description: Divers exploring a sunken wreck face deadly danger when their oxygen supply begins to run out.

name: Saw
description: Two men wake up chained in a grimy bathroom and must follow the deadly rules of a sadistic killer known as Jigsaw.

name: Friday The 13th
description: A group of camp counselors are stalked and murdered by an unknown killer at Camp Crystal Lake.

name: Halloween
description: Fifteen years after murdering his sister, Michael Myers escapes a mental institution and returns to terrorize his hometown.

name: I Know What You Did Last Summer
description: Four friends are stalked by a mysterious killer one year after covering up a tragic accident.

name: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre
description: A group of friends fall victim to a family of cannibals while traveling through rural Texas.

name: When a Stranger Calls
description: A babysitter receives threatening phone calls from a mysterious stranger who turns out to be closer than she thinks.

name: Hush
description: A deaf writer living alone in the woods must fight for her life when a masked killer appears outside her window.

name: The Strangers
description: A young couple staying in a remote vacation home are terrorized by three masked strangers.

name: Until Dawn
description: Friends staying at a remote mountain lodge face terrifying threats during a deadly night of survival.

name: Heart Eyes
description: A mysterious killer targets couples on Valentine's Day, turning a romantic holiday into a deadly nightmare.

name: Titanic
description: A young aristocrat and a poor artist fall in love aboard the ill-fated RMS Titanic.

name: Anyone but You
description: Two former enemies pretend to be a couple during a destination wedding in Australia.

name: It Ends with Us
description: A young woman falls for a charming neurosurgeon but must confront the painful patterns of her past relationships.

name: No Hard Feelings
description: A woman answers a job listing from wealthy parents looking for someone to date their awkward teenage son.

name: Pride and Prejudice
description: Sparks fly when spirited Elizabeth Bennet meets the proud Mr. Darcy in this classic romance.

name: Love, Rosie
description: Two lifelong friends struggle with timing and distance as their relationship evolves into love.

name: Revolutionary Road
description: A young couple living in suburban Connecticut struggles with personal problems and societal expectations.

name: Friends with Benefits
description: Two friends try to maintain a purely physical relationship but discover emotions complicate things.

name: No Strings Attached
description: Two friends decide to keep their relationship casual without emotional attachment.

name: The Notebook
description: A young couple's love story unfolds over decades as they face separation and hardship.

name: Jumanji
description: Two kids discover a magical board game that releases jungle dangers into the real world and frees a man trapped inside for decades.

name: Zathura
description: Two brothers playing a mysterious board game launch their house into outer space and must survive cosmic challenges.

name: Anaconda
description: A documentary crew searching for a lost tribe in the Amazon encounters a giant deadly snake.

name: Jurassic World
description: A new dinosaur theme park experiences chaos when a genetically engineered dinosaur escapes.

name: King Kong
description: A film crew travels to Skull Island and discovers a giant ape who becomes fascinated with their leading actress.

name: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl
description: Blacksmith Will Turner teams up with eccentric pirate Jack Sparrow to rescue a governor’s daughter from cursed pirates.

name: The Mummy
description: Adventurers accidentally awaken an ancient Egyptian priest who unleashes supernatural terror.

name: Tomb Raider
description: Lara Croft embarks on a dangerous adventure to uncover the truth behind her father’s disappearance.

name: Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time
description: A rogue prince teams up with a mysterious princess to protect a magical dagger that can control time.

name: Into the Blue
description: Divers searching for treasure discover a plane full of illegal cargo that puts their lives at risk.

name: Final Destination
description: After escaping a deadly accident through a premonition, a group of teenagers are hunted by death itself.

name: Truth or Dare
description: A harmless game of truth or dare becomes deadly when a supernatural force punishes those who lie or refuse.

name: Countdown
description: A nurse downloads an app that predicts when a person will die and realizes her time is running out.

name: Polaroid
description: A vintage camera curses anyone whose photo is taken with it, leading to terrifying consequences.

name: One Missed Call
description: People begin receiving voicemails from their future selves predicting their deaths.

name: Friend Request
description: A college student becomes the target of a supernatural curse after unfriending a mysterious girl online.

name: Us
description: A family's vacation turns into terror when their sinister doppelgängers appear.

name: Cam
description: A camgirl discovers someone who looks exactly like her has taken over her online account.

name: Oculus
description: A woman tries to prove that a haunted mirror caused the deaths of her parents years earlier.

name: Smile
description: A therapist begins experiencing terrifying supernatural events after witnessing a traumatic incident.
